outputs: Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
warnings: Terminal behaviour described in this appendix is decorative, ceremonial, or retained for staff confidence. It is not authoritative for restricted procedures.
The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
